---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest an idea or new functionality for PathFinderAI
title: '[FEATURE] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''

---

## Description
A clear and concise description of what the feature is. 

## Use Case
Why would this feature be useful? What problem does it solve for you or other users?

## Proposed Solution
A clear and concise description of what you want to happen. 

## Alternatives Considered
A clear and concise description of any alternative solutions or features you've considered.

## Additional Context
Add any other context, mockup screenshots, or link to relevant APIs here.
